generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque output based on input current (I_M). Part of the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component reducing speed and transmitting torque (τ_G) from motor to cycloidal gearbox with manufacturer-provided gear ratio."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing final torque output (τ_out) with low backlash characteristics for high-precision machining applications."
]

instance Sinumerik840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller executing motion commands and processing position/speed/acceleration inputs to output motor current/torque."
]

instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution position encoder mounted on motor shaft providing angular position data for torque/velocity calculations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftPositionData
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary high-resolution position encoder mounted on gearbox output enabling backlash compensation and friction analysis via encoder discrepancy."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxOutputPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current (I_M) which is converted to torque using motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorShaftPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

instance DerivedSystemOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing structural hierarchy (Motor → Gearbox → Cycloidal Gearbox) and energy flows (Current → Rotational)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram detailing component interactions and behavior within the first vertical axis system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance TorqueFromCurrentModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical derivation model converting motor current (I_M) to torque (τ_M) using motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance VelocityFromEncoderTicksModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model deriving angular velocity from encoder tick counts with resolution compensation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance FrictionlessDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing ideal motor and gearbox behavior without friction components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for gearbox analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model implementing Stribeck effect for dynamic friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model implementing Dahl's friction model for pre-sliding behavior analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction model implementing LuGre friction model for comprehensive joint friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance SimulationMotor : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation block for motor dynamics (Simulation_M) with configurable parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance SimulationGearWheel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation block for gear transmission dynamics (Simulation_GW) with manufacturer parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance SimulationCycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation block for cycloidal gearbox dynamics (Simulation_GB) with backlash compensation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance RawMotorCurrentTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series raw data trace of motor input current (I_M) streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService, SimulationMotor
]

instance RawMotorShaftPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series raw data trace of motor shaft angular position from primary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VelocityFromEncoderTicksModel, SimulationMotor
]

instance RawGearboxOutputPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series raw data trace of gearbox output angular position from secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxOutputPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationCycloidalGearbox
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed data trace of motor torque (τ_M) derived from current and motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService, SimulationGearWheel
]

instance DerivedGearboxTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed data trace of gearbox output torque (τ_G) estimated via dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedGearboxTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService, SimulationCycloidalGearbox
]

instance DerivedSystemOutputTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed data trace of system output torque (τ_out) derived from secondary encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedSystemOutputTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationComparisonService
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque trace (τ_rM) from frictionless/with-friction motor simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationComparisonService
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque trace (τ_rG) from frictionless/with-friction gear transmission simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationComparisonService
]

instance SimulatedOutputTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque trace (τ_r_out) from frictionless/with-friction cycloidal gearbox simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedGearboxTorqueTrace
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationComparisonService
]

instance FrictionModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata containing friction model parameters (Coulomb, viscous coefficients) from manufacturer specifications."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for creating structural and behavioral engineering models (BDD/IBD)."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DataTraceAggregationService
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for executable simulation models including friction dynamics and system behavior."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, SimulationComparisonService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (I_M, encoder angles) from physical to virtual system."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceAggregationService
]

instance CustomProcessingComponents : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) consuming input data traces and producing output traces using simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationComparisonService
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based or SCADA-like dashboard for real-time visualization of time-series data, model deviations, and friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service combining white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models to continuously identify joint friction characteristics during operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight, ModelRefinementAction
]

instance DataTraceAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service organizing raw sensor data into structured data traces with metadata (source, timestamp, processing method)."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuredDataInsight
]

instance SimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating Simulink-based frictionless/with-friction models against real-time data to quantify inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight, ControlAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service displaying time-series data, model deviations, and friction characteristics (e.g., Stribeck curve) for human interpretation."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualFrictionAnalysisInsight
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the gearbox with continuous model updates."
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updating white-box and black-box friction models based on deviations between simulated and measured data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance StructuredDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Organized raw sensor data into structured traces (I_M, τ_M, ω_G) with complete metadata for traceability."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantified inaccuracies between Simulink models and real-time measurements to assess model fidelity."
]

instance ControlAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Indirect enhancement of robot motion accuracy by refining control algorithms with updated friction models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VisualFrictionAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of friction characteristics including Stribeck curves and model deviation trends."
]

instance FirstVerticalAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox,
                 Sinumerik840DslController, MotorShaftEncoder, GearboxOutputEncoder,
                 MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance FirstVerticalAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with high-precision requirements (path repeatability 0.06mm, positional accuracy 0.1mm)."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **digital shadow does not transmit data back to the physical system** (per its passive definition). However, the **underlying digital twin framework** (implied by the paper’s context) could enable:
  - **Indirect influence via model updates**: If evolved into a **digital twin**, refined friction models (white-box or black-box) could be **reintegrated into the CNC controller** (SINUMERIK 840D) for **real-time compensation** of joint friction.
  - **No direct actuation**: The DS itself is a **read-only replica** for analysis; any virtual-to-physical interaction would require extending it to a **digital twin** with active control loops."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates in **real-time**, leveraging **live data** streamed via MQTT during the robot's operation. The time scale is aligned with the **operational cycle of the robot**, where data traces are continuously updated to reflect the current state of the physical system. The system supports **dynamic exchange of friction models** and **real-time identification** of friction parameters, enabling continuous improvement during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is a **purpose-driven, modular architecture** with:
  - **Core components**:
    - **Digital Shadow (DS)**: Passive replica of the first axis, focusing on friction analysis.
    - **Processing pipeline**: Links **data traces** (sensors/simulations) to **models** (SysML/Simulink) via **traceable associations**.
    - **Visualization layer**: Dashboard for human-machine interaction.
  - **Orchestration**:
    - **Purpose-driven design**: Aligned with the goal of **friction model identification** and **motion accuracy improvement**.
    - **No closed-loop control**: The DS is **not autonomous**; it requires **external systems** (e.g., CNC controller) to act on insights.
    - **Extensible**: Designed to integrate with **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for broader digital twin ecosystems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered are:
  1. **As-operated**: The DS is **live during robot operation**, capturing **real-time friction behavior** under varying conditions (load, temperature, wear).
  2. **No as-designed/as-manufactured phases**: Focuses solely on **operational data** (no CAD or manufacturing tolerances).
  3. **Purpose-driven evolution**: The DS is **iteratively refined** to improve friction modeling accuracy over time (e.g., adapting to wear via **continuous model identification**)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity** are ensured via:
  - **Model validation**:
    - **Simulink models** are validated against **real-time sensor data** (comparing simulated vs. measured torque/velocity).
    - **Friction models** (white-box/black-box) are **continuously identified** during operation to adapt to **wear, temperature, or load changes**.
  - **Uncertainty quantification**:
    - **Encoder discrepancy** (difference between motor and secondary encoder) is used to infer **backlash and elasticity**.
    - **Deviation analysis**: The difference between **simulated (ˆ*r_out*)** and **measured (*r_out*)** data traces quantifies friction effects.
  - **Verification mechanisms**:
    - **Traceability**: Each data point is linked to its **source** (sensor/processing component) and **model** (Simulink block).
    - **Metadata**: Includes **system properties** (e.g., temperature, load) at the time of data collection."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin connects to the physical system via **MQTT** for streaming time-series data (input current *I_M*, output angle) from the robot’s sensors (encoders) to the Digital Shadow. The connection is **unidirectional**, with no data transmitted back to the physical system. The data is processed in real-time to generate derived traces (torque, velocity) and simulated outputs, which are then visualized in a dashboard. No specific network protocols (e.g., OPC UA) or architectures (e.g., local/edge servers) are detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed as a **dashboard-based visualization system**, but specific hosting details (e.g., local/edge server, industrial PC, web server) are not provided in the document. The focus is on **real-time data processing and visualization** of friction-related data traces, with no explicit mention of deployment infrastructure or scalability constraints."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is **limited in scope to the first axis of the MABI MAX robot**, with no explicit integration with external systems (e.g., Siemens MindSphere, ERP, or other Digital Twins). The **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** framework is referenced as a potential enabler for broader integration but is not implemented in this use case. Data exchange is confined to internal sensor data and simulation models."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards and frameworks: **(1) SysML** for system modeling (no specific ISO/IEC standard numbers mentioned). **(2) MQTT** for data streaming (no specific protocol standard numbers mentioned). **(3) Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** as a reference architecture for Digital Twin integration. No additional standardization details (e.g., ISO 10303-1, IEC 63278) are provided in the document."
]
